titles.title: I Will Call Upon the Lord

authors.author: Aus der Bibel
Michael O´Shields
Ich will rufen zu dem Herrn

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will call upon the Lord Who is worthy to be praised So shall I be saved from mine enemies.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Lord liveth! And blessed be my rock And let the God of my salvation be exalted.
